text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 162 

SR_SCRNG_ID 

LABEL: Screening Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) AHC screening standardized nine-digit unique identifier. 

LONG NAME: SR_SCRNG_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 9 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: Alphanumeric character string that contains intelligence (e.g., 2230025803 is the 25,803rd unique 
screening for the AHC bridge organization B23).
